plain_text:
You need to keep your food assistance (SNAP). Your benefits end on 06/30/2026. To keep them, you must act by 06/20/2026.

Do these things:
- Send in Form FA-100. This is the recertification form.
- Do your phone interview on 06/16/2026, from 9:00 AM to 11:00 AM.
- If you miss it, call (555) 014-2200 to reschedule before 06/20/2026.
- Send proof of your income from the last 30 days.

If they do not get everything by 06/20/2026, your benefits stop on 06/30/2026. Then you must apply again.
action_items: Send completed Form FA-100 on or before 06/20/2026
Do your phone interview on 06/16/2026 between 9:00 AM and 11:00 AM
If you miss the interview, call (555) 014-2200 to reschedule before 06/20/2026
Send proof of household income from the last 30 days
citations: Your household's certification period for SNAP benefits will end on 06/30/2026.
Submit a completed Form FA-100 (Application/Recertification for Assistance) on or before 06/20/2026.
Your interview is scheduled for 06/16/2026 between 9:00 AM and 11:00 AM.
If you miss this interview, you must call (555) 014-2200 to reschedule before the deadline above.

If the Division does not receive your completed recertification and required verifications by 06/20/2026, your SNAP benefits will stop on 06/30/2026 and you will need to file a new application to receive benefits again.
disclaimer: This is a plain-language summary to help you understand your notice. It is not legal advice and does not change the official notice. When in doubt, contact your caseworker or a local legal aid office.
